name: remote-sync-movie
description: A tiny cross-platform local-file movie sync player for two remote viewers.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check mpv-client.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js
scripts.pack:zip: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist | Out-Null; Compress-Archive -Path manifest.json,dnr-rules.json,content.js,public -DestinationPath dist\extension.zip -Force"
